titleStmt.title: SII 24.403: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 403. (A.R. No. 263 of 1929-30.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of gold by Timmayaṅgār, son of Ōbaḷayya of Kuṇḍūr a traivarṇika-vaishṇava of Sindakula-gōtra and a disciple of Rāmānuja-Ayyaṅgār of Kuṇḍūr, for providing for offerings to god Raṅganātha on the 4th day of the festival conducted in the name of Bhūpati-Uḍaiyar. The details of date viz. Śaka 1452, Khara, Ṛishabha, ba. ēkādaśī, Friday, Uttiraṭṭādi correspond to 1531, A.D. May 12, Friday; ·83; ·12.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrīman mahārājādhirājan rājaparamesvaran śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvīra Accutarāyamahārāyar prithuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa ś(ā)kābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 - ṉ melccellar niṉṟa kara samvatssarattu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tiru Ekā daśiyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nakṣatrattu nāḷ tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar koyil
śrīraṅganārāyaṇa jīyarum Aṉaittukkottu sthāṉīkarum bhāradvājagotrattu Āpastamba sūtrattu kuṇṭūr rāmāṉujayaṅkār śiṣyar Āṉa trikavaṇākaRead traivarṇika śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil sintakulagotrattu kuṇṭūr Opaḷaiyan putran timmayaṅ kāṟku poliyūṭṭu cilāsādhanam paṇṇikkukku is written below the line.ṭuttapaṭi nammuṭaiya Upaiyam Āka perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha
devar tammuṭaiya tiruttoppukku taimāsam pūpati Uṭaiyar tiruṉāḷ nālām tirunāḷaikku tirumaṇṭapattil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu ciṟappu Amutu ceytaruḷukiṟa kaṭ ṭaḷaikku poliyūṭṭāka śrīpaṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa poṉ 100 2 10 5kku nūṟṟukku Oru paṇam viḻukkāṭu varuṣam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭiyil kūṭina poṉ 10 5 kku Amutu ceytaruḷum
campā taḷikai 3 10 6 kku poṉ 3ý 6 kalacotaram taḷikai 4kku U 8 tiruotti cāmam taḷikai 2kku U 6 Āka taḷikai 4 10 2kku poṉ 5 poriamutu 5 100This symbol stands for kalam ttukku poṉ 1 U 5 veccamutu kūṉ 4 10kku poṉ 1 U 5 Atirasam paṭi 2 kku U 6 teṉkuḻal paṭi 2kku U 5 vaṭai paṭi 2kku U 5 cukiyaṉ paṭi 2kku U 3 tiru muṉ(k) kuttuviḷakkukku ney Amu
tu vilai U 3 Iḷaṉīr 3 100 kku U 1 Aṭaikkāy Amutu 2 1000kku U 1(1/2) Ilai yamutu 5 1000kku U 1� cantaṉam paṭi 5 10kku U 6 Āka poṉ 10 1 perumāḷ pari kalattukku tirukkai vaḻakkam poṉ 4 Āka poṉ 10 5 Ituvum perumāḷ tirukkoṭi Āḻvāṉ koṇṭaruḷukiṟa tiruṉāḷ ṉālukkum koṟaṭṭile Eḻun taruḷi Atirasappaṭi Amutu ceytaruḷa poliyū
ṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 3 10 5kku vaṭṭikku kūṭina poṉ 4 U 2kku tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Atirasappaṭi 2kku U 6 Āka tiruṉāḷ 4kku Atirasappaṭi 8kku poṉ 2 U 4 cantaṇam tirunāḷ 4kku tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku paṭi 10 6 kku U 2 kku tirunāḷ 4kku paṭi 6 10 4 kku U 8 Aṭaikkāy Amutu
Āka poṉ 4 U 2 Āka poṉ 100 6 10kku vaṭṭikku kūṭṭina poṉ 10 9 U 2 Inta Upayam Iraṇṭukkum Inta vakaippaṭi śrīpaṇṭārattile viṭṭu Amutuceytu Aruḷak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭakkaṭavatākavum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭunālil Oṉṟu ṇṭāṉatu Ellām tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppatiil triverṇikaRead traivarṇika śrīvaiṣṇavarkku prasādikkakka ṭavatākavum nityapaṭi Āka perumāḷ cātti Aruḷa samarppitta nāyagam periya muttu caṅku cakkaram
Iṭṭa cavaṭi patakkam Oṉṟukku Āka Inta vakaippaṭik kaiṅkiriyaṅkaḷ Ācantrārkka sthāyiyāka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.403 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
